instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that renders `events` grouped by `date` string, emitting a heading per date and a nested list of event titles and times. Assume events are pre-sorted by date. Escape all displayed text.
code:
<#-- Model: events: [{ date, title, time }] sorted by date --> <#assign lastDate = "">
<#list events![] as event> <#if event.date!"" != lastDate> <#if lastDate?has_content>

${event.date?html}

    <#assign lastDate = event.date!"">
  • ${event.time?html} ${event.title?html}
    • <#if !event?has_next>
